title: agropyron pectinatum
intro: Agropyron pectinatum, also known as Green Needle Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Agropyron pectinatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
